    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ReservationDTO>
    ReservationController.createReservation(@Valid ReservationDTO dto, String userId, String username)
    Books a hotel room for the authenticated user.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ReservationDTO>>
    ReservationController.getAllReservations()
    Retrieves all reservations in the system.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ReservationDTO>>
    ReservationController.getMyReservations(String userId)
    Retrieves all reservations belonging to the currently authenticated user.
